beats.title: The Great Fall
beats.synopsis: Professor Aronnax is knocked off his ship during an encounter with the mysterious 'sea monster'.

branches.label: Climb onto the metal hull
branches.outcomeHint: You realize the monster is made of steel.

beats.title: Meeting the Captain
beats.synopsis: A hatch opens and the Professor is brought inside the Nautilus to meet Captain Nemo.

branches.label: Ask about the ship
branches.outcomeHint: Nemo shows you the power of electricity.

branches.label: Ask if you can leave
branches.outcomeHint: Nemo explains you must remain for your own safety.

beats.title: The Coral Forest
beats.synopsis: The team explores an underwater forest of coral and discovers rare marine species.

branches.label: Catalog new species
branches.outcomeHint: Your notes will change science forever.

branches.label: Search for giant pearls
branches.outcomeHint: You find a pearl the size of a coconut.

beats.title: The Giant Squid
beats.synopsis: Massive tentacles wrap around the Nautilus, threatening to crush the hull.

branches.label: Help Nemo defend the ship
branches.outcomeHint: Together, you drive the beast away.

branches.label: Secure the inner hatches
branches.outcomeHint: You keep the water from flooding the cabins.

beats.title: Wonders of the Deep
beats.synopsis: Nemo reveals the giant windows showing the bioluminescent life of the deep ocean.

beats.title: Calm After the Storm
beats.synopsis: The Nautilus survives, and Nemo reflects on the majesty and danger of the sea.

branches.label: Request to return to land
branches.outcomeHint: You want to share these secrets with the world.

beats.title: Guardian of the Abyss
beats.synopsis: Professor Aronnax chooses to stay on the Nautilus, exploring the final frontiers of the Earth.

beats.title: The Voice of the Sea
beats.synopsis: Nemo drops Aronnax near a shore; the Professor writes his famous book to inspire conservation.
